store_headline: Recording Studio WordPress Theme for Producers and Engineers
store_subheadline: Launch a studio website with audio portfolio, booking forms, session packages, and WooCommerce.
features: Built with Elementor page builder for easy customization
Specialized for recording studios and sound production
Wolf Core plugin with studio-specific elements
Seamless audio integration for showcasing work samples
Booking form for studio session scheduling
Video gallery with custom player options
WooCommerce integration for selling studio time and merchandise
Wolf Playlist Manager for audio showcase
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Social sharing integration across multiple platforms
selling_points: The only recording studio theme in the catalog — built for producers and engineers, not artists or bands
Dark split-screen engineer-at-console photography that communicates professional production credibility instantly
Heavy condensed white typography gives Gaintab a distinct industrial production identity no other music theme replicates
Audio sample playback via Wolf Playlist Manager lets prospective clients hear your work without leaving the page
Advanced parallax scrolling creates cinematic depth that positions a studio at the premium end of the market
WooCommerce for session packages, beats, and studio merchandise — sell time and products from one platform
Booking form integration for client session scheduling directly through your studio website
Built for the people behind the sound, not in front of the crowd
key_benefits: Attract clients, not fans, with a studio identity signaling professional production
Showcase audio samples on-site so clients evaluate your sound before contact
Sell session packages and beats through WooCommerce without a separate e-commerce platform
Convert visitors into booked clients with integrated session scheduling in the layout
Build production credibility with mixing-console photography and condensed-type aesthetics
Stand apart from artist sites with a visual identity built for production
Launch a studio site that rivals major facilities — no developer needed
design_features: Custom music player with playlist support

testimonials.text: Great theme can do a lot with, got plenty of features and is easy to configure. Support is great i had some problems as a wordpress newbie but support solved everything.
testimonials.author: kontakt952

testimonials.text: I absolutely love this website template. It's extremely easy to customize via Elementor, and the design is gorgeous. I would highly recommend it!
testimonials.author: lowdandcleer

testimonials.text: Great design, easy installation, fast and efficient customer support.
testimonials.author: VanaVarazdinka
